title.en: Soon, a pinnacle realm god fell into Ye Tian's ...

content.en:
Thundered!!!

A Peak Realm God was seriously injured and soon died at the hands of Ye Tian's copy body.

The Yonghao Realm God is desperate, but there are too many star-winged six-armed shields refined by Ye Tian, although the other replica bodies only have one star-winged six-armed shield, and their combat power is not as good as that of the Yonghao Realm God, but there is a replica body that can intercept the Yonghao Realm God.

The other copied bodies only need to deal with other peak realm gods, and not all of these peak realm gods are very powerful, most of them are relatively average, and they are not as good as his combat power.

In addition, Ye Tian was willing to work hard, but all of these peak realm gods had problems with their bodies, and some of their bodies were under the side effects of extradimensional assimilation, how could they dare to work hard!

Soon, a pinnacle realm god fell into Ye Tian's hands.

At this time, it was too late for the other peak realm gods to fight hard, and they only wanted to escape, but this place had been blocked, even if they removed the Thousand Days Eternal Array, there was still a Star Dimension Void Heaven Array to block here, so that they could not escape, and they could not contact the other peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace.

Otherwise, the other peak realm gods of Taihao Tianchao Palace came to support, and Ye Tian was really not an opponent.

Finally, the peak realm god here is only the Yong 05 Hao realm god.

Ye Tian's multiple copy bodies were besieging the Yonghao Realm Gods, but the Yonghao Realm Gods were too powerful, and the Eternal Dao Species they cultivated were also Perfect-level Eternal Dao Species, and half of the Eternal Realm Spirits in their bodies were Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirits.

In terms of combat effectiveness, Ye Tian was much worse than the Yonghao Realm God, if it weren't for the blessing of a large number of super-dimensional secret treasures, as well as the extra-dimensional power of the medium-dimensional thing Kun Realm Wood Fragment, he would not be able to compete with the Yonghao Realm God at all.

Maybe within a few moves, the Yonghao Realm God will be able to kill him!

But who let Ye Tian have so many super secret treasures, so that he can compete with the gods of the Yonghao realm.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's replica body was completely pierced through its defenses, and its body was pierced by the power of the extradimensional dimension, and it soon fell and died.

However, only a replica body fell, and Ye Tian didn't care at all.

After a while, another replica body came to besiege the Yonghao Realm God.

And with the passage of time, the consumption of extradimensional power on both sides is extremely serious.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was no longer able to stimulate the power of the super dimension, and his combat power was greatly reduced, and he was killed several copy bodies by the Yonghao Realm God one after another, and many of the super dimensional secret treasures were destroyed, which was completely scrapped and could not be repaired.

But even so, the Yonghao Realm God was only slightly injured, which showed how powerful his combat power was, far surpassing Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian stubbornly entangled the Yonghao Realm God and did not give him any hope of escaping.

At this time, the Yonghao Realm God also completely understood, "Ye Tianjie God, your clone is very special, even if it falls, it can be easily refined!"

"So what?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"No wonder you have so many extra-dimensional resources!! Yonghao Realm God suddenly realized, "The price you paid for refining the clone should be very low, so you used a large number of clones to enter the Death Void to explore, so you obtained a large number of extra-dimensional resources in such a short period of time, and the super dimensional treasure land of our Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace, it was also you who sacrificed multiple clones to snatch the resources there!"

Ye Tian didn't answer, but he didn't deny it either.

"If I had known this, I should have attacked you before you cultivated to a high-level peak realm god, and you would definitely not be able to resist at that time!"

Even when Ye Tian had just gotten off the Jialanbao ship, he did it directly, and there was a little hope.

But now there is no hope of killing Ye Tian at all, and even he may not be able to live.

He felt that the extra-dimensional things in his body no longer had much extra-dimensional power, and once he did not have super-dimensional power, his combat power would decline very seriously, and he would inevitably be killed by Ye Tian at that time.

After another moment, he was no longer able to urge the slightest extradimensional power.

However, Ye Tian also had a copy body that could activate the power of the extradimensional dimension.

In a flash.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies triggered the extra-dimensional technique, the extra-dimensional vine light thorn.

Burst!

"Poof!"

The Yonghao Realm God began to vomit blood, trembling all over, this was a situation where he was seriously injured and could not control his body.

It can be said that the power of the super-dimensional is too powerful, with or without the power of the super-dimensionality, for a peak realm god, the strength is simply a world of difference.

Of course.

Even if he didn't have the power of the super dimension, with his powerful cultivation, he would be able to severely damage Ye Tian under his desperate efforts. []

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, if you let me go, I will never deal with you again, and Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace will not be an enemy of the human race. "

The Yonghao Realm God roared.

"Impossible, you still want me to let you go?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Then let's die together, your body should be the body, and only the body will carry a large number of super secret treasures, and the other clones only have a small number of super secret treasures. Once the body falls, you will surely die. "

Yonghao Realm God said.

Noumenon?

Ye Tian secretly sneered, each of his copied bodies could be regarded as an ontology or a clone.

So, he was not afraid at all.

Seeing that Ye Tian was still besieging him, without the slightest intention of sparing his hand, the Yonghao Realm God was desperate and began to go crazy.

As a result, he burned the extradimensional things in his body and no longer suppressed the extradimensional assimilation.

270 In an instant, his eternal Dao species and body entered the stage of rapid extradimensional assimilation, and his consciousness was also in the process of extradimensional assimilation.

Immediately after, he burned all his power, and he could explode the power of the extradimensional dimension again, and it would be beyond the peak level of the dimension.

His attack was aimed at Ye Tian's copy body that carried the most super-dimensional secret treasures, and his body turned into a super-dimensional light.

This light surpassed everything, and it also surpassed Ye Tian's reaction speed.

Burst!

This ray of light penetrated Ye Tian's copy body, and those super dimensional secret treasures were all pierced away, and they couldn't intercept the desperate final blow of the Yonghao Realm God at all.

Under the blow, Ye Tian's replica body completely fell.

Those severely damaged Ultra Secret Treasures also broke away from the broken replica bodies one by one, and were put away by other replica bodies with a wave of their hands.

"Yonghao Realm God, desperately strike the last blow and kill me a copy body, why bother!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

Immediately, he began to deal with the battlefield, and the other replica bodies entered the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, doing his best to maintain this Extradimensional Great Array.

He didn't know if Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace would attack again, so maintaining this large array was the best choice.

In this way, even if other peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace came back, they might not be able to break through his Star Dimension Void Heaven Array!
